posts.author: GustavoM (J. Gustavo M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I would like to request an enhancement to the new workflow feature.

I tried to test the new feature by moving the automation workflow from one of our boards, but I was only able to add part of it. I started with the automations triggered by when the item is created, but then I was not able to add the rest of our workflow in the same board from other triggers, such as when a status changes, etc.

I contacted support and I was told that sadly at the moment the workflow feature is limited to one trigger.

So, I would like to request to enhance the Workflow to be able to add automations from multiple triggers, so it would be possible to really include a complete and complex workflow of a single board or multiple boards into it.

Besides not being able to include and visualize a complete workflow in a single monday.com workflow, it is also not very friendly to have to create multiple external workflows for each trigger in each board in the workspace.
